title: Maxemi
body:
# A Base For Minecraft Servers >**If your new to this kind of stuff and if your confused just use these alternatives:** > >* **[(purpur)](https://purpurmc.org/)** > >* **[(paper)](https://papermc.io/)** >**Warning!** > >* **Quilt versions are probably buggier than Fabric!** > >* **Remember to backup your worlds before updating or changing!**
How to install a Fabric/Quilt server? Just follow these guides * [Quilt guide](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/server/) * [Fabric guide](https://fabricmc.net/wiki/player:tutorials:server:windows)
How to install it on your server? Use launchers like [Prismlauncher](https://prismlauncher.org/) and [Atlauncher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads) and create a instance and choose modrinth and choose maxemi and then open the mods folder of the instance and copy the mods over to your servers mods folder **or just download all the mods manually** also i probably explained everything horribly
Optimization Guide **Full optimization guide recommended by YouHaveTrouble [On Github](https://github.com/YouHaveTrouble/minecraft-optimization)** * Use vendors like [Adoptium](https://adoptium.net/) and [Amazon Corretto](https://aws.amazon.com/corretto/) * [Get Aikar's flag](https://flags.sh/) * Change ```sync-chunk-writes``` to ```false``` in server.properties * Simulation-distance ```Good starting value: 4``` view-distance ```Good starting value: 7``` in server.properties * Pregen the map with mods like [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky)
No timings? Server profiling? use this alternative [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)
Want more server side mods? You can use [this](https://serverside.infra.link/) Server side Mods list
Velocity? Just add [CrossStitch](https://modrinth.com/mod/crossstitch) or [fabricproxy-lite](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricproxy-lite) and follow their guide
Exploit fix? Bugfix? I recommend using [GolfIV](https://modrinth.com/mod/golfiv) for exploits and for bugfixes [(Carpet)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet) [(Carpet extra)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet-extra) [(Carpet fixes)](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-fixes) Carpet Fixes and Carpet Extra wont work with out Carpet
Should i use this? Is it worth using? Well Yes and No it depends on your needs and what you are looking for
Inspired by Devin's [Adrenaserver](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaserver) project on Modrinth
